---
title: "Module 1: Introduction to Data Science Tools"
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

An overview of the modern data science stack and how the tools fit together across the pipeline.

## Topics

- What is the data science pipeline?
- Where Python, R, and SQL each shine
- Setting up your local environment

## The Data Science Pipeline

Each tool has its place:

| Stage | Tool |
|-------|------|
| Store & query | SQL |
| Wrangle & model | Python / R |
| Visualize | Python / R / Quarto |
| Communicate | Quarto |
